name: open-in-app
title: Open in App
description: Fuzzy-find folders and open them in your preferred apps with alias shortcuts
author: schmas

commands.name: open-in-app
commands.title: Open in App
commands.description: Fuzzy search files/folders and open in configured app

commands.name: manage-apps
commands.title: Manage Apps & Paths
commands.description: Add, edit, remove app configurations and search paths

preferences.name: defaultTerminal
preferences.title: Default Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal app used when opening a folder in terminal

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
